**Determining strike announcement**

I need to output JSON according to the strike extraction specifications. This confirms it is an upcoming strike, so I will set isStrike to true. I need to extract "strikeData" fields such as startDate, endDate, locationType, locationCodes, and guaranteedTimes, considering it might pertain to "Linee Suburbane."
